label: IL Bocconcino
question: Is Pomodor PELATI residual error an extraction bug or GT bug?
answer: GT bug — VL ground truth qty 2 / €50 / €25 does not match the visible invoice; v27 extraction matches visible values.

visible.transcriptionSource: Manual image inspection — QUANT.=1,000; P.VENDA=27,560 EUR; DESC=20,00%; VALOR LÍQUIDO=22,05 EUR

matchesVisible.unit_price_field: partial — copies VALOR net (22.05) not P.VENDA gross (27.56); €0 impact when qty=1

evidenceAnswers.visibleQty1or2: qty **1** — QUANT. column prints 1,000 (column-reconstruction, column-shift-audit, DB record)
evidenceAnswers.valorShows2205ForSingleUnit: yes — VALOR LÍQUIDO **22,05 EUR** for qty 1; math: 27.56 × (1−20%) ≈ 22.05
evidenceAnswers.gtQty2Total50MatchesVisibleColumn: no — no column shows qty 2, unit €25, or total €50; 2×25=50 is inferred not printed
evidenceAnswers.gtOrigin: Post-geometry re-extract likely interpreted pack notation (CX 2.5KG*6) as purchased qty 2

extractionCaveat.note: v27 copies VALOR €22.05 into unit_price field (not P.VENDA €27.56). This is a field-semantics / column-binding issue with €0 financial impact when qty=1 and total=22.05. It does NOT explain the €27.95 GT delta.
extractionCaveat.preV21Errors: Pre-hybrid runs showed DESC €20 bleed and qty 2 inference — different failure modes

recommendation.gtRevision: Revise GT to qty 1, gross/list unit 27.56 or net 22.05, total 22.05
recommendation.vlMetricImpact: Revising GT removes €27.95 from global financial error bucket for this row
